records.m_Talk_ENG: So what? In the end, that "entity" is just another C.O., isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what? In the end, that "entity" is just another C.O., isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what? In the end, that "entity" is just another C.O., isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There aren't many who can overcome the Corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There aren't many who can overcome the Corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There aren't many who can overcome the Corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only difference is whether they die sooner or later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only difference is whether they die sooner or later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only difference is whether they die sooner or later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Humanity always finds a way to survive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Humanity always finds a way to survive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Humanity always finds a way to survive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Using you as a stepping stone, I will study this phenomenon and reach that entity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Using you as a stepping stone, I will study this phenomenon and reach that entity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Using you as a stepping stone, I will study this phenomenon and reach that entity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're not just putting on an act to avoid paying me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're not just putting on an act to avoid paying me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're not just putting on an act to avoid paying me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then you're truly insane...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then you're truly insane...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then you're truly insane...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it... I should've known that the money was too good to be true!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it... I should've known that the money was too good to be true!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it... I should've known that the money was too good to be true!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I promise I'll pay any amount of money you request.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I promise I'll pay any amount of money you request.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I promise I'll pay any amount of money you request.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, I'll give you whatever you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, I'll give you whatever you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, I'll give you whatever you want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As long as you become part of my grand plan, anything is within your reach.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As long as you become part of my grand plan, anything is within your reach.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as you become part of my grand plan, anything is within your reach.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Drop dead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Drop dead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Drop dead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like I'm just gonna sit here and let you take me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like I'm just gonna sit here and let you take me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like I'm just gonna sit here and let you take me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...! What was that just now...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...! What was that just now...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...! What was that just now...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Replacer hybrider?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Replacer hybrider?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Replacer hybrider?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I struggling against those things...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I struggling against those things...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I struggling against those things...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your CRF consumption is accelerating, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your CRF consumption is accelerating, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your CRF consumption is accelerating, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I made a few modifications here and there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I made a few modifications here and there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I made a few modifications here and there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you're no exception.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you're no exception.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you're no exception.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so... there's no way I'd lose to these small fry...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so... there's no way I'd lose to these small fry...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so... there's no way I'd lose to these small fry...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: These are no mere small fry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These are no mere small fry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These are no mere small fry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They were specifically designed to take down people like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They were specifically designed to take down people like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They were specifically designed to take down people like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been eager to test their performance. Now's the perfect opportunity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been eager to test their performance. Now's the perfect opportunity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been eager to test their performance. Now's the perfect opportunity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Damn it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Damn it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Damn it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't fight properly here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't fight properly here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't fight properly here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to escape to somewhere I can recover...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to escape to somewhere I can recover...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to escape to somewhere I can recover...!
